name: stockyard-alertpulse
description: Configurable alerting for LLM infrastructure. Rules for error rates, latency, cost thresholds. Notify via Slack, Discord, PagerDuty, email, or webhooks.

tools.name: alertpulse_rules
tools.description: List all alert rules with current status (firing/OK).

tools.name: alertpulse_history
tools.description: Get alert history: recent firings and resolutions.

tools.name: alertpulse_test
tools.description: Fire a test alert to verify notification channels work.

tools.name: alertpulse_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the AlertPulse proxy is running and healthy.
